_comment: Codex CLI PROJECT-LOCAL hook config for the research-pipeline skill.
_comment_scope: Deploy to .codex/hooks.json in your RESEARCH PROJECT (the repo where you run research), NOT to ~/.codex/hooks.json. Project-local scope ensures the Stop hook only fires when you are working in that project, not in unrelated sessions.
_comment_stop: Stop fires when Codex finishes a turn. Exit 2 sends stderr as a continuation prompt, preventing Codex from stopping.
_comment_prompt: UserPromptSubmit fires before each user prompt. The resume-inject hook is safe to use globally (it exits silently when no round_state.json is present).
_comment_features: Also add 'codex_hooks = true' under [features] in .codex/config.toml (project-local) or ~/.codex/config.toml (user-global for the UserPromptSubmit hook).
